## Change Classification
- **Change Class**: <!-- feature | bugfix | refactor | docs | governance | release | metadata | breaking-change -->
- **Approval Class**: <!-- standard | sensitive | governance-class | emergency | release-critical -->

- **Breaking Change**: <!-- yes | no -->

## Scope Confirmation
- [ ] All changes are within the scope defined by the task contract
- [ ] No files outside the authorized scope were modified
- [ ] No drive-by edits or opportunistic cleanup was performed

## Documentation Impact
- [ ] README update: <!-- performed | not required -->
- [ ] Wiki update: <!-- performed | not required | needs-sync label applied -->
- [ ] Glossary update: <!-- performed | not required -->
- [ ] Governance documents: <!-- affected | not affected -->

## Release and Changelog Status
- [ ] Version impact classified correctly
- [ ] Changelog entry added: <!-- yes | not required (metadata/none) -->
- [ ] Breaking change documented with migration note: <!-- yes | not applicable -->

## Validation Statement
_Describe what validation was performed and the results:_

## Known Risks or Issues
_List any known issues, limitations, or risks. If none, explicitly state "None."_

## Compliance Checklist
- [ ] Task contract exists for this work
- [ ] Acting role has authority for all changes made
- [ ] Scope was respected — no unauthorized file modifications
- [ ] Documentation was updated as required by DOCUMENTATION_POLICY
- [ ] Changelog was updated for meaningful changes
- [ ] Release impact was classified per RELEASE_POLICY
- [ ] Completion summary is truthful and matches evidence
- [ ] Protected assets (if modified) had correct authority
- [ ] No known failures are hidden
